basics.name: M. Tony Gibbons
basics.label: Engineering Leader | Strategic Finance Practitioner | Data Science Innovator
basics.summary: Engineering leader, strategic finance practitioner, and data science innovator with expertise spanning silicon to P&L. Builder of intelligent systems that drive business impact—from the hardware layer to the P&L statement.

work.name: Google, Cloud Finance Transformation
work.summary: Leading data analytics and engineering initiatives for Google Cloud's finance transformation.
highlights: Drove the complete product lifecycle for Google Cloud's first unified $XXB+ revenue platform by researching and designing business logic, using Python for EDA, and coding the foundational SQL data pipeline
Established data governance processes to ensure confidentiality and scaled the platform from zero to over 8,000 daily active users
Initiated and drove a second product lifecycle to build a full $XXB+ granular P&L profitability data solution
Hired and led a new Business Systems Analyst (BSA) team of 4, providing executive leadership with project updates
Spearheaded novel AI/ML finance tools, including dashboards enabling natural language (RAG) queries and ML models for root-cause-analysis

work.name: Google, Data Center Supply Chain
work.summary: Led finance and analytics initiatives for Google's data center supply chain operations.
highlights: Led an AI/ML-driven strategic asset optimization initiative that improved operational efficiency and saved $100M in one quarter
Used Machine Learning and regression techniques to predict stranded inventory and identify alternate usage scenarios
Led a new Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) team, creating a $10B+ CapEx Long-Range Planning process
Developed data infrastructure aligned with statistical forecasting methodologies for Infrastructure Finance

work.name: Google, Cloud Technology Partnerships Strategy
work.summary: Drove strategic operations for the Cloud Technology Partnerships organization.
highlights: Drove strategic operations for the Cloud Technology Partnerships org, supporting its growth from 50 to 225+ employees
Hired operations lead and managed a Business Intelligence team, architecting new real-time intelligence systems
Built financial model for forecasting data center ROI used in C-level investment recommendations
Managed hiring plans and conducted strategic portfolio analysis

work.name: Google, Data Center Infrastructure R&D
work.summary: Managed finance and analytics for Google's data center infrastructure R&D organization.
highlights: Established and managed the multi-$100M annual budget and financial controls for the R&D organization
Integrated OpEx, CapEx, and HR data to support VP & Director on portfolio and operational planning
Developed robust data application to automate HR resource allocation for OPEX and portfolio analysis
Solution scaled across Google engineering and continues to inform core P&L opex apportionments

work.name: Cisco, Technical Services
work.summary: Led strategic operations initiatives for Technical Services organization.

work.name: Cisco, Voice Technology Group
work.summary: Managed financial planning and analysis for Voice Technology Business Unit.
highlights: Supported business unit controller functions

work.name: Intel Corporation
work.summary: Designed I/O Controller Hub Chipsets for Intel's processor platforms.
highlights: ASIC hardware design and verification

volunteer.summary: Conducted clinical and laboratory research in ophthalmology and neuroscience.
highlights: Conducted clinical research exploring connections between neurodegenerative brain diseases and glaucoma
Coordinated volunteer recruitment and cognitive testing protocols
Performed laboratory research on glaucomatous neuropathy causes using advanced imaging techniques
Utilized genotyping and mouse model analysis to investigate disease mechanisms

volunteer.summary: Led research and analysis for student-run venture capital fund during MBA program at Brigham Young University.
highlights: Evaluated early-stage investment opportunities
Conducted due diligence on startup companies
Led investment analysis and recommendations

education.studyType: Master of Information and Data Science (MIDS)

awards.title: Magna Cum Laude
awards.summary: Graduated with high honors in Computer Engineering

awards.title: GMAT Score: 760 (99th percentile)
awards.summary: Exceptional performance on Graduate Management Admission Test

references.name: Anand Jeyaraman
references.reference: Mark has a rare combination of deep financial acumen and strong technical skills. His proficiency in Python, data science, SQL and machine learning is exceptional. His transparent leadership style, mentorship abilities, and capacity to empower team members while providing clear direction demonstrate his exceptional leadership qualities.

references.name: Gurkan Yilmaz
references.reference: Mark is able to translate complex analysis to structured simple messages. He is eager to learn new skills and has desire to push the technology boundaries (SQL, automation). His collaborative problem-solving abilities on complicated projects and commitment to advancing technical capabilities make him an invaluable team member.

projects.name: UC Berkeley MIDS Portfolio
projects.summary: Collection of data science and machine learning projects demonstrating expertise in RAG systems, computer vision, NLP, and cloud-native architectures. See the Projects tab for detailed case studies and implementations.
highlights: RAG Systems
Computer Vision
NLP
Cloud Architecture
